# HuggingFace Space build requirements.
#
# Hand-authored, NOT generated by `uv export`. Reason: the recipe below relies
# on `--extra-index-url` directives in a specific shape (one for CUDA-built
# torch, one for the pre-compiled CUDA wheels of llama-cpp-python), which
# `uv export --format requirements-txt` does not emit reliably. Keep this file
# in lockstep with whatever the Space actually needs.
#
# scripts/deploy_space.py copies this file to the repo root as `requirements.txt`
# at deploy time.

# torch ships the CUDA runtime libs that llama-cpp-python's CUDA wheel links against.
--extra-index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu128
torch==2.8.0
hf_transfer
huggingface_hub

# Pre-built CUDA wheel for llama-cpp-python — no compilation on the Space.
--extra-index-url https://abetlen.github.io/llama-cpp-python/whl/cu124
llama-cpp-python

# Gradio runtime + PDF parsing + ZeroGPU decorator
gradio==6.15.2
pymupdf>=1.24
spaces>=0.30

# Schemas + LinkedIn fetcher used by the pipeline
pydantic>=2.11.10,<=2.12.5
pydantic-settings>=2.3
python-jobspy>=1.1.80
